_note: Lock all fields marked [FIXED]. Only modify fields marked [VARIABLE].

subject.placement: [FIXED] centered on a matte white marble surface
subject.scale_hint: [FIXED] small object, approx. 10cm tall, occupying 15–20% of frame height

environment.scene: [FIXED] minimal flat-lay table surface, close-up lifestyle context
environment.surfaces: [FIXED] white Carrara marble with faint veining
environment.props: [FIXED] single dried botanical stem to the right, small ceramic bowl to the left

camera.aperture: [FIXED] f/3.5, background and props softly out of focus
camera.framing: [FIXED] product centered, slight negative space above

lighting.quality: [FIXED] soft, even, clean highlights on product surface
lighting.fill: [FIXED] white reflector card from right, 50% fill strength

style.color_palette: [FIXED] white, off-white, light grey, single natural accent

negative_prompts: [FIXED] no people, no text, no logos, no watermarks, no cartoon, no CGI look, no clutter, no colored backgrounds
